PreToolUse.command: node -e "const {CommandGate} = require('@dommaker/harness/dist/gates/command'); const input = JSON.parse(process.env.TOOL_INPUT || '{}'); const gate = new CommandGate(); if (!gate.isAllowed(input.command || '')) { console.error('❌ Command blocked by harness CommandGate'); process.exit(1); }"

PostToolUse.command: node -e "const {constraintChecker} = require('@dommaker/harness/dist/core/constraints/checker'); constraintChecker.checkConstraints({operation:'code_implementation',projectPath:process.cwd()}).then(r => { if (!r.passed) { console.error('❌ Iron Law violated'); process.exit(1); } if (r.warningCount > 0) { console.warn('⚠️ ' + r.warningCount + ' guideline warning(s)'); } console.log('✅ Constraint check passed'); }).catch(e => { if (e.code === 'CONSTRAINT_VIOLATION') { console.error('❌ ' + e.message); process.exit(1); } console.error('⚠️ Check error: ' + e.message); });"
